nasb.text: And you have not kept charge of My holy things yourselves, but you have set foreigners to keep charge of My sanctuary.”

esv.text: And you have not kept charge of my holy things, but you have set others to keep my charge for you in my sanctuary.

cnv.text: 你們自己沒有看守我的聖物，卻委派別人在我的聖所裡代你們看守。’”

ccb.text: 你们自己不管理我的圣物，却把我的圣所给外人治理。
